tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured laboratory values are within normal limits. There is no evidence of renal dysfunction, electrolyte imbalance, dyslipidemia, or abnormal glucose metabolism. The microalbumin/creatinine ratio is normal, indicating no significant proteinuria. Overall, these results suggest stable metabolic and renal status for this 84-year-old female patient.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
